item.trainmurdermystery.bat.desc: Vanilla attack logic, left-click to hit people.
item.trainmurdermystery.defense_vial.des:
Outlaws can right-click to drink and gain a shield.
Normal players can right-click a tray to pour the defense vial onto the tray.
The next player who takes the defense vial and consumes/drinks the item will receive a shield.
This method grants at most one layer of shield.
item.noellesroles.bucket_of_h2so4.desc:
Cleaner tool.
Right-click a corpse to clean it.
item.noellesroles.cooked_food.desc: Cooked by the chef. After cooking, it has various effects.
item.noellesroles.letter.desc: When task point X-ray is enabled, holding the envelope reveals the item vending machine.
item.noellesroles.master_key.desc: A key that can open any door.
item.noellesroles.master_key_p.desc: A key that can open ordinary wooden doors. Has limited uses.
item.trainmurdermystery.iron_door_key.de: A key that can open iron doors. Has limited uses.
item.trainmurdermystery.key.desc:
Key used to open your own room.
When task point X-ray is enabled, holding the key lets you see your room's door.
item.starrailexpress.knife.desc: Melee weapon; left-click knocks a person back, right-click raises the knife for a moment and then drops to stab the player dead.
item.starrailexpress.bat.desc: Melee weapon; left-click attacks with a cooldown, spamming does not deal damage.
item.starrailexpress.crowbar.desc: Right-click permanently breaks open a door, which can be repaired by a locksmith with a screwdriver.
item.starrailexpress.grenade.desc: Throwable weapon; right-click throws it and explodes, killing players within a certain radius of the impact point. Hold right-click to charge for a longer throw. The grenade is blocked by player entities.
item.starrailexpress.firecracker.desc: Right-click to place on the ground; after 15 seconds it makes a gunshot sound.
item.starrailexpress.revolver.desc: The most basic ranged weapon; right-click to fire.
item.starrailexpress.derringer.desc: Only 2s cooldown; only replenishes ammo when hitting a player or getting a kill, and this gun has no brain penalty.
item.starrailexpress.sniper_rifle.desc: Has ultra-long range, slower fire rate, requires loading Magnum bullets, can attach a scope; crouch + right-click to aim. When hitting a player beyond 50 blocks, it ignores shields and kills them.
item.starrailexpress.magnum_bullet.desc: Large-caliber bullet used to load the sniper rifle.
item.starrailexpress.scope.desc: Scope that can be mounted on a sniper rifle.
item.starrailexpress.body_bag.desc: Disposable item that removes corpses from the ground.
item.starrailexpress.blackout.desc: When purchased, it turns off all lights on the map.
item.starrailexpress.psycho_mode.desc: After purchase, the killer enters psycho mode, attacks with a bat, and gains one layer of shield (except for the clown).
item.starrailexpress.poison_vial.desc: Right-click to place on a food or drink tray, causing the next player who takes the food or drink to become poisoned after consumption.
item.starrailexpress.scorpion.desc: Right-click to place on a bed; scorpion venom spreads to nearby beds within a certain range, poisoning players sleeping on them.
item.starrailexpress.old_fashioned.desc: Old-fashioned cocktail that can be drunk.
item.starrailexpress.note.desc: Sticky note used to record information; crouch + right-click to write text, right-click to stick it on a wall.
item.starrailexpress.binding_tool.desc: Binding tool used to bind monitors.
item.starrailexpress.nunchuck.desc: Nunchaku, exclusive weapon for the martial arts instructor; usage tutorial can be found in the instructor's profession.
item.starrailexpress.lockpick.desc: Right-click opens any door; shift + right-click locks the door.
item.noellesroles.a_bottle_of_water.desc: A bottle of water that can be drunk.
item.noellesroles.foodstuff.desc: Ingredient, exclusive to the chef profession.
item.noellesroles.pan.desc: Frying pan used for cooking food, exclusive to the chef profession.
item.noellesroles.once_revolver.desc: A revolver that can fire only once.
item.noellesroles.handcuffs.desc: Handcuffs; right-click to cuff a player, who can escape by continuously crouching.
item.noellesroles.patroller_revolver.des: Patroller's special pistol with an extremely short firing cooldown.
item.noellesroles.night_vision_glasses.d: Night vision goggles that provide vision when worn.
item.noellesroles.diving_helmet.desc: Diving helmet that provides underwater breathing and the dolphin's blessing when worn.
item.noellesroles.diving_boots.desc: Diving boots that grant Deep Sea Explorer III when worn.
item.noellesroles.fake_knife.desc: Fake knife that looks like a real knife; can be raised but cannot kill.
item.noellesroles.yinyang_sword.desc: Prelude weapon for Black & White Rampage. Left-click: Black & white particle dash, 6 blocks, kills. Right-click: 1 second charge, 4 block AOE, kills.
item.noellesroles.fake_revolver.desc: Fake gun that looks like a real gun; can fire five times but cannot cause any kills.
item.noellesroles.fake_bat.desc: Fake baseball bat that looks like a real bat but cannot deal damage.
item.noellesroles.fake_psycho_mode.desc: Fake psycho mode used to deceive others, exclusive to the magician profession.
item.noellesroles.fake_grenade.desc: Fake grenade that looks like a real grenade; can pull the pin but cannot be thrown.
item.noellesroles.fake_lockpick.desc: Fake lockpick tool that looks real but cannot be used.
item.noellesroles.fake_crowbar.desc: Fake crowbar that looks real but cannot be used.
item.noellesroles.fake_body_bag.desc: Fake body bag that looks real but cannot hold corpses.
item.noellesroles.delusion_vial.desc: Also known as 'fake poison'; can be purchased in the clown's shop as a hallucinogenic drug that makes players think they are poisoned, but it cannot be fatal.
item.noellesroles.defibrillator.desc: Defibrillator, exclusive to the doctor profession; hold right-click to use on a player. If that player dies within 120 seconds, they will resurrect after 30 seconds.
item.noellesroles.boxing_glove.desc: Boxing gloves, exclusive to the boxer profession; hold right-click to raise the gloves, right-click to knock back and stun a person, and put all their items on cooldown.
item.noellesroles.antidote_reagent.desc: Hold right-click to use on a player; can check if the player is poisoned and has limited uses.
item.noellesroles.conspiracy_page.desc: Conspirator profession exclusive item; right-click to open a page to guess a profession—players correctly guessed will die.
item.noellesroles.blank_cartridge.desc: Trickster profession exclusive item; right-click on a player to put their revolver on cooldown.
item.noellesroles.smoke_grenade.desc: Trickster profession exclusive item; throws to create a large amount of smoke, with a 30-second cooldown.
item.noellesroles.chlorine_bomb.desc: Poisoner profession exclusive item; upon landing, poisons players within a certain radius.
item.noellesroles.purify_bomb.desc: Doctor profession exclusive item; upon landing, detoxifies players within a certain radius.
item.noellesroles.flash_grenade.desc: Flash grenade; when thrown, it blinds players looking at it.
item.noellesroles.decoy_grenade.desc: Decoy grenade; after being thrown, it continuously emits gunfire sounds.
item.noellesroles.reinforcement.desc: Repair tool; right-click to install on a door to make it resist one crowbar attack, crouch + right-click to remove the tool from the door.
item.noellesroles.screwdriver.desc: Screwdriver; crouch + right-click to remove items from a door. Locksmiths can additionally use the screwdriver to restore a door's state (repair doors broken by crowbars).
item.noellesroles.alarm_trap.desc: Alarm trap that triggers an alarm when activated by a crowbar.
item.noellesroles.delivery_box.desc: Right-click a player to swap items between the passer and the receiver.
item.noellesroles.hallucination_bottle.d: Durability 2; right-click to force players within a certain range to twitch their view three times.
item.noellesroles.written_note.desc: Recorder profession exclusive item; right-click to log a player's identity.
item.noellesroles.bomb.desc: Bomber profession exclusive item; right-click a player to pass the bomb they hold, which will explode after a set time and kill the holder.
item.noellesroles.wheelchair.desc: Elder profession exclusive item; right-click to prevent a wheelchair from being placed on the ground.
item.noellesroles.lock.desc: Lock used to secure doors; when a killer uses a lockpick to open it, they must manually unlock.
item.noellesroles.pocket_watch.desc: Pocket watch; right-click to view in-game time, with a 60-second cooldown.
item.noellesroles.adrenaline.desc: Disposable item, exclusive to the alchemist profession; right-click on a player to increase their max health by 2 points.
item.noellesroles.antibiotic.desc: Disposable item, exclusive to the alchemist profession; right-click on a player to detoxify them.
item.noellesroles.hedinghong.desc: Disposable item, exclusive to the alchemist profession; right-click on a player to poison them.
item.noellesroles.toilet_poison.desc: Disposable item, exclusive to the poisoner profession; right-click on a toilet to poison the next player who sits on it.
item.noellesroles.dogskin_plaster.desc: Disposable item, exclusive to the alchemist profession; right-click on a player to prevent their sanity from decreasing for 30 seconds.
Disposable item; right-click a player to apply one random buff from 6 configurable effects and notify the target which effect was applied.
item.noellesroles.fire_axe.desc: Firefighter exclusive item with 3 durability; hold right-click to lift the fire axe and kill the target, consuming all 3 durability on a kill. You can also crouch + right-click a door to break it, consuming 1 durability. When the fire axe is not at full durability, it cannot be used to cut through people.
item.noellesroles.throwing_knife.desc: Press Q to throw; right-click raises the throwing knife and can kill.
item.noellesroles.rope.desc: Rescuer profession exclusive item; right-click to pull a person within a straight line range to you.
item.noellesroles.extinguisher.desc: Firefighter exclusive item with 5 durability; right-click or hold right-click to spray a player, granting them Slowness and Blindness, and can remove gasoline applied by arsonists.
item.noellesroles.passbook.desc: Accountant exclusive item; right-click to deposit all your money into a passbook, which will drop upon your death.
item.noellesroles.alchemy_material.desc: Alchemist exclusive item used to craft potions.
item.noellesroles.signature_paper.desc: Celebrity exclusive item; right-click to sign, crouch + right-click to sign a life-and-death contract; see the celebrity profession description for details.
item.noellesroles.life_and_death_shape.d: Life-and-death contract that allows a celebrity to block one instance of damage for you.
item.noellesroles.signed_paper.desc: Signed paper; players holding it can continuously see the celebrity's location and gain Speed I when looking at the celebrity.
item.noellesroles.bowen_badge.desc: Bowen badge, exclusive to the Jotaro profession; hold right-click for 3 seconds to dash, killing any target you collide with and knocking back surrounding targets.
item.noellesroles.shisiye.desc: Maid Sakuya exclusive item; drinking grants Speed 10.
item.noellesroles.problem_set.desc: Problem set; right-click to start solving problems. Correct answers give rewards; failures give penalties.
item.noellesroles.antidote.desc: Right-click on a player to antidote them; enters cooldown after use.
item.noellesroles.pill.desc: Edible pill; purchased from the doctor shop as an antidote pill, from the poisoner shop as a toxin pill.
item.noellesroles.toxin.desc: Disposable item, ranged weapon; right-click on a player to poison the targeted player.
item.noellesroles.catalyst.desc: Poisoner exclusive item; right-click to cause death to all players who become poisoned.
item.noellesroles.bandit_revolver.desc: Pistol used by bandits and executioners, with shorter range.
item.noellesroles.stalker_knife.desc: Stalker profession second-stage exclusive weapon. Right-click to charge and stab to kill the target, increasing second-stage progress upon kill. Crouch + right-click for quick charge. Has a 10-second attack cooldown.
Stalker profession second-stage exclusive weapon. Right-click to charge and stab to kill the target, increasing second-stage progress upon kill. Crouch + right-click for quick charge. Has a 10-second attack cooldown.
item.stupid_express.jerry_can.desc: Arsonist exclusive item; right-click to douse a player in gasoline.
item.stupid_express.lighter.desc: Arsonist exclusive item; right-click to ignite a player covered in gasoline. See the arsonist profession description for details.
item.starrailexpress.camera.desc: Surveillance camera, functions like real-world surveillance
item.starrailexpress.dark_toilet.desc: Dark toilet, task block; right-click to sit on it and complete the bathroom task.
item.starrailexpress.light_toilet.desc: Light-colored toilet, task block; right-click to sit on it and complete the bathroom task.
item.starrailexpress.security_monitor.de: Security monitor used to view the perspective of surveillance cameras.
item.noellesroles.monitoring_terminal.de: Remote monitoring terminal. Right-click a security monitor to bind first, then right-click to remotely view bound monitors.
item.noellesroles.ninja_knife.desc: Disposable item, ninja's melee weapon; right-click to instantly assassinate the target, silent.
item.noellesroles.ninja_shuriken.desc: Disposable item, ninja's ranged weapon; hold right-click to throw, silent.
item.noellesroles.mercenary_contract.des: Mercenary exclusive item. Others can right-click to sign a mercenary contract, select a target and pay 175 gold. The mercenary can right-click a signed contract to receive the payment and gain a wanted target. Contracts can be dropped with Q key.
item.noellesroles.riot_shield.desc: Guard exclusive item. Equipped in offhand to block incoming attacks and provide protection.
item.noellesroles.baton.desc: Guard exclusive item. Melee weapon with 4 durability; left-click to attack, can stun targets.
item.noellesroles.radio.desc: Broadcaster exclusive item. Right-click to use; allows communication with other players.
item.noellesroles.short_shotgun.desc: Short-range shotgun used by bandits; deals high damage at close range.
item.noellesroles.executioner_gun.desc: Fool exclusive weapon. Can only deal damage to players with the 'Heresy' effect (instant kill). Starts with 1 bullet, can only be replenished through the Tarot Society.
item.noellesroles.honored_note.desc: Fool exclusive item, purchasable at the shop (50 gold). Right-click walls/floors to place, creating an indestructible text entity. Players can press V near the note to pray and gain the 'Tarot Society Member' tag.
item.noellesroles.spirit_cloak.desc: Fool exclusive item, purchasable at the shop (200 gold). Right-click to gain 5 seconds of invincibility, cannot attack, movement speed unchanged. 90 second cooldown.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_cleaning_byprod: A byproduct from DNF cleaning tasks. Exchange 1 for 1 emerald at an exchange task point.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_task_tool.desc: Hold right-click while looking at a DNF task point for 8 seconds to complete it.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_cleaning_task_p: DNF cleaning task point. Hold right-click with the task tool to clean it.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_exchange_task_p: DNF exchange task point. Trades 1 cleaning byproduct for 1 emerald.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_toxic_heart.des: Special material gained from Poisoner poison kills. Five can be used in the redemption formula.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_redemption_poti: Path of Redemption potion. Crafting two triggers the Chef and Poisoner independent ending.
An old diary found by the Chef at the configured point, with clues about the old chef, Poisoner, and redemption potions.
item.starrailexpress.dnf_redemption_form: Formula gained after the Poisoner and Chef meet. Right-click to consume materials and craft two redemption potions.
